creator: hrkfdn@gmail.com
text:
And here goes the second try: *grrrr*

--- pekwm-2.diff begins here ---

diff -Naur ./Makefile ../pekwm/Makefile
--- ./Makefile	2008-12-23 16:47:38.000000000 +0100
+++ ../pekwm/Makefile	2008-12-23 16:47:44.000000000 +0100
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	pekwm
-PORTVERSION=	0.1.9
+PORTVERSION=	0.1.9a
 PORTEPOCH=	1
 CATEGORIES=	x11-wm
 MASTER_SITES=	http://pekwm.org/projects/3/files/ \
diff -Naur ./distinfo ../pekwm/distinfo
--- ./distinfo	2008-12-23 16:47:38.000000000 +0100
+++ ../pekwm/distinfo	2008-12-23 16:47:48.000000000 +0100
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (pekwm-0.1.9.tar.bz2) = 13aab792a5eb25673f4e61d8a0016edb
-SHA256 (pekwm-0.1.9.tar.bz2) = 1505492ae9c81e7160a73ddc39b8d10610d2195a51563a04a76d0d5d2ad81b8a
-SIZE (pekwm-0.1.9.tar.bz2) = 354440
+MD5 (pekwm-0.1.9a.tar.bz2) = 78a63a3630ef5ef9f191b888086a79af
+SHA256 (pekwm-0.1.9a.tar.bz2) = e25d50646f2571b525da1f3833e3be8d427bb14c0204df4c80a21a3e90eebe7c
+SIZE (pekwm-0.1.9a.tar.bz2) = 354338

--- pekwm-2.diff ends here ---
